identificationModule.officialTitle: Neuroprotective Effects of Coenzyme Q10 in Paclitaxel-Induced Peripheral Neuropathy

interventions.name: Coenzyme Q 10
interventions.description: Coenzyme Q10 200 mg orally twice daily for twelve weeks, for CoQ 10 grpup only

interventions.name: Paclitaxel
interventions.description: : Paclitaxel 80 mg/m² administered weekly for twelve weeks to Control and CoQ groups

primaryOutcomes.measure: Change from Baseline in Serum Nerve Growth Factor (NGF) Levels
primaryOutcomes.description: Serum NGF levels will be quantified using a double-antibody sandwich ELISA kit to assess neurotrophic status.Unit of Measure: picograms per milliliter (pg/mL).Higher levels are generally associated with nerve repair/regeneration
primaryOutcomes.timeFrame: Baseline (1 hour before first cycle) and End of Treatment (1 hour after final cycle, approximately Week 12).

primaryOutcomes.measure: Change from Baseline in Serum Neurofilament Light Chain (NFL) Levels
primaryOutcomes.description: Serum NFL levels will be measured via ELISA as a biomarker of axonal injury and neurodegeneration.Unit of Measure: picograms per milliliter (pg/mL).Higher levels indicate greater degrees of neuronal damage
primaryOutcomes.timeFrame: Baseline (1 hour before first cycle) and End of Treatment (1 hour after final cycle, approximately Week 12).

primaryOutcomes.measure: Change from Baseline in Serum Osteopontin (OPN) Levels
primaryOutcomes.description: Serum OPN levels will be quantified using a double-antibody sandwich ELISA kit.Unit of Measure: nanograms per milliliter (ng/mL).low OPN is linked to worse neuropathy.
primaryOutcomes.timeFrame: Baseline (1 hour before first cycle) and End of Treatment (1 hour after final cycle, approximately Week 12).

primaryOutcomes.measure: Change from Baseline in Serum Malondialdehyde (MDA) Levels
primaryOutcomes.description: MDA will be measured as a marker of lipid peroxidation and oxidative stress using a colorimetric assay kit.Unit of Measure: nanomoles per milliliter (nmol/mL).Higher levels indicate increased oxidative stress
primaryOutcomes.timeFrame: Baseline (1 hour before first cycle) and End of Treatment (1 hour after final cycle, approximately Week 12).

eligibilityModule.eligibilityCriteria:
Inclusion Criteria:

* Women aged 18 years or older with newly diagnosed breast cancer.
* Chemotherapy-naïve (have not received prior chemotherapy).
* Eastern Cooperative Oncology Group (ECOG) performance status of 0-2.

Exclusion Criteria:

* Pregnancy or breastfeeding.
* Severe cardiovascular disease (left ventricular ejection fraction \<55%).
* Hereditary muscle disorders.
* Diabetes mellitus or history of alcoholism.
* Thyroid dysfunction.
* History of allergy to Coenzyme Q10 or related compounds.
* Advanced liver disease (liver enzyme elevation \>3× upper limit of normal or cirrhosis).
* Chronic kidney disease (CKD), defined as estimated glomerular filtration rate \<60 mL/min/m².
